S.FORM: Marvin Barnes sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1952 , ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 7, Marvin Barnes, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
